Result.Title: Detailed Sales Dashboard
Result.Narrative:
1. Sales Trend Over Time (Line, table: All Invoices)
This visualization displays the sum of ExtendedPrice aggregated by OrderDate, showing how sales have changed over time. The chart is sorted chronologically by OrderDate, allowing users to observe sales trends and seasonality. No additional fields are shown or hidden.

2. Top 10 Products by Sales (Bar, table: All Invoices)
This bar chart presents the top 10 products ranked by total sales, calculated as the sum of ExtendedPrice for each ProductName. The products are sorted in descending order of sales, highlighting the highest revenue-generating items. Only the top 10 products are displayed; other products are excluded from view.

3. Sales by Country (Column, table: All Invoices)
This column chart shows total sales per country, with ExtendedPrice summed for each Country. The chart allows comparison of sales performance across different geographic regions. Sorting is by Country, and no additional fields are included.

Across the whole dashboard: The data for all visualizations comes from the All Invoices table. Dashboard-level filters for Order Date, Salesperson, and Product allow users to refine the data shown in all charts, ensuring that the visualizations reflect only the selected criteria.
